note: Bootstrap seed index derived from vector/header work, then extended with the source-authored VBlank/task-dispatch, bootstrap/display setup, input-stream, controller helper chain, and the downstream selected-input inventory/equipment plus adjacent magic/status menu helpers through 0x0088C1 and 0x008C34-0x008C7F. Current best fit: 0x00501C latches packed (duration,value) bytes from 0xFF1400 into 0x8A4E/0x8A4F, 0x005036 is the matching run-length writer, 0x00505C feeds playback into the selected-input mirror at 0x8A7A-0x8A7D, 0x007924-0x007D9B owns the adjacent magic/status submode plus localized six-spell grid, 0x007D9C-0x008059 bridges back into the visible inventory/equipment list UI, 0x00805A-0x0088C1 covers repeat-gated input and nearby inventory/magic status drawing, 0x0088D6+ still holds the byte-sensitive gauge/spell-bar renderer, 0x008C34 now snapshots the local selector scratch, clears visible-list state, and keeps only sub-0x08 top-row selector ids in 0x95E2/0x95E3, and the `0x020000+` ROM body now flows through bank-local include owners rather than top-level whole-bank blobs.
